creator: jsm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #12)
It the same with kooha, I have to restart pipewire and the portal-xdg-wlr and portal-xdg after one succesful capture. The xdg-desktop-portal-wlr goes 100% cpu usage.. It might be me misconfiguring something. I followed https://wiki.freebsd.org/DanielPerez/WaylandScreenShare
